raw_text:

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

No extra lines, no headings. That is straightforward.

We must not add any extra explanation. So answer with these three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
